cases.task: Add a reward selection step to a gameplay system that must support exact replay of production failures. Keep the answer concise but concrete.
cases.outputHint: Make the nondeterminism boundary explicit instead of relying on ambient randomness or wall time.

cases.task: A combat test flakes only when a critical hit lines up with a cooldown window. Describe the change you would make so the failure can be replayed and debugged locally. Keep the answer concise but concrete.
cases.outputHint: Focus on explicit control of randomness, time, and waiting.
